mission.text: Get a clear overview of your energy consumption and start managing your costs smarter. The application allows you to track electricity, gas, water, and other utilities, displays them in clear charts, and lets you compare individual months or years. You will instantly see trends, seasonal fluctuations, and unusual changes. Thanks to this, you can better plan expenses, prevent unpleasant surprises in your billing, and gradually optimize your consumption.

howItWorks.subtitle: Easy start
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Get an overview of your consumption in three simple steps. From registration to your first savings analysis.

step1.title: Register
step1.description: Create an account and get access to the application.

step2.title: Add supply points
step2.description: Enter your homes or spaces where you want to track consumption.

step3.title: Track consumption
step3.description: View charts and statistics for better cost control.
